entries.rationale_summary: Trend break exit: 3 consecutive days below SMA50 (breach of balanced profile threshold). Close £13.218 vs. SMA50 £13.344 with negative slope signals trend integrity loss. Position held 12 days (>2-day minimum age). Smallest position notional; exit reduces portfolio from 6 to 5 positions and improves cash buffer from 3.17% to ~7.3%. Stop price not breached (current £13.168).
